title: Sauros Skoteinos
description: Obscure dinos, with very goofy models!
body:
Ever wanted to play minecraft with dinos, but your favourite isn't there? Fear not! This mod aims to add some obscure dinos into the game!

Currently we only have Moros Intrepidus, but more will be added!
**REQUIRES GECKOLIB!**

**USE WITH JUST ENOUGH ITEMS OR SIMILAR MOD!** I ain't got the time to put every recipe on here!


Blank Card:
Crafted using iron, lapis, paper and any stone/rock

Saltasaurus Card:
Crafted using Herbivore meal, blank card, Saltasaurus Plates, lap & kelp

Salta shield:
Smithed using salta infused ingots and a shield

Salta Infused Ingots:
Crafted using salta plates & iron

Carnivore Meal:
Crafted with one chicken, beef, porkchop and mutton (raw)

Herbivore Meal:
Crafted with one wheat, carrot, potato & kelp

**Saltasaurus:**

Spawns in Jungles, Sparse Jungles & Bamboo Jungles

Tamed with Saltasaurus Card

Rideable

Drops Saltasaurus Plates

**Moros Intrepidus:**

Spawns in Badlands, Jungles, Deserts & Forests

Tamed with Carnivore Meal

Drops Intrepidus Claw, can be used to make Intrepidus Dagger

**Therizinosaurus**

Spawns in snowy slopes

First Boss
